title: OpenSpec workflow interface showing archive plan button at execution complete stage

analysis.title: OpenSpec workflow interface showing archive plan button at execution complete stage
analysis.description: Dark-themed project management interface displaying a 7-stage workflow with the current stage at 'Execution Complete' and a highlighted green 'Archive Plan' button for the next action.
